title: Prohibit Recipe Step Runtime Viz Sink Access
forbids: recipe step source reading or invoking a runtime .viz sink
why: A step owns a pure optional createStep({ viz }) evidence projector. Runtime sink access mixes generation with transport, makes visualization depend on trace state, and creates a second emission authority.
remediate: Return the evidence needed by visualization from run, then project portable layers through the step's createStep({ viz }) facet.
message: Recipe steps must author visualization through createStep({ viz }); runtime .viz sink access is forbidden.
